name: Emprise Bank
description_short: Emprise Bank is a full-service bank offering checking, savings, personal loans, credit cards, and wealth management with 55,000 surcharge-free ATMs nationwide.
description_long: Emprise Bank operates as a traditional retail bank providing comprehensive consumer and business financial services. The institution maintains a national footprint through branch locations and an extensive ATM network, positioning itself as a mainstream banking provider rather than a niche lender. The company's 2024 Annual Report indicates a focus on organizational transitions while emphasizing customer empowerment and relationship building. The bank's primary service offerings include personal and business checking accounts, savings accounts, personal loans starting at 9.79% APR, credit cards, wealth management services, and a proprietary product called CashPlease®. They provide digital banking options including online account access, e-business services, and video banking appointments alongside traditional in-branch services. The routing number 101100579 confirms institutional banking infrastructure with standard Federal Reserve participation. Emprise Bank distinguishes itself through emphasis on digital convenience combined with traditional banking services. The availability of 55,000 surcharge-free ATMs provides competitive network access. The bank highlights security features including multi-factor authentication and cybersecurity education, along with financial literacy content around credit scores and consumer protection against scams. The bank presents as an established institutional provider rather than a specialized lender. While basic rate information is available on their website, specific APR ranges for products other than personal loans and detailed fee structures are not transparently listed in available content. As a traditional bank, Emprise may have higher account minimums and less flexibility than online-only alternatives, though this cannot be confirmed from the provided website content.
pros: Access to 55,000 surcharge-free ATMs nationwide for account holders
Personal loans available with rates starting at 9.79% APR for debt consolidation
Multiple digital banking channels including video, phone, and in-branch appointments
Multi-factor authentication (MFA) security features for account protection
Comprehensive financial education content on credit scores, fraud prevention, and financial planning
Dedicated e-business services and loan portal for business customers
Wealth management services available through dedicated sign-in portal
cons: Specific APR ranges, fees, and account requirements not transparently displayed on website for most products
Limited information about minimum balance requirements or monthly maintenance fees
Personal loan rates starting at 9.79% may not be competitive for borrowers with excellent credit
best_for: Customers seeking a full-service traditional bank with national branch and ATM access
Borrowers interested in consolidating debt through personal loans with fixed terms
Business owners needing comprehensive banking and business services in one institution
diagnosis: Emprise Bank is best for customers who value the combination of traditional banking services with digital convenience and want access to a nationwide ATM network. The primary caveat is that detailed pricing, fee structures, and specific product terms are not fully transparent on their website, requiring direct contact for accurate rate and requirement information.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
